#include <hexi/hexi.h>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // We are forced to use a non-const buffer_adaptor and binary_stream because the library does not support const buffers.
    // This is done by const_cast, which is undefined behavior if the buffer is const.

    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<uint8_t>, false> adaptor(non_const_buffer);

    // Read the header
    uint32_t header;
    adaptor.read(&header);

    // Create a binary_stream from the adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);

    // Read the null-terminated message
    std::string_view message = stream.view();

    return {header, message};
}
